# PuSkeleton

## Intent

- skeleton
- loading placeholder
- async content placeholder

## Prefer When

- Use while content is loading and the final layout shape is known.

## Avoid When

- Avoid for empty data states; use PuEmptyState.

## Import

```ts
import { PuSkeleton } from '@partner-up-dev/design-web'
```
